ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse Core
ModMetaData.author: ArchDukeJim
ModMetaData.description:
RimSynapse Core — LM Studio connector library for RimWorld mods.
Provides a clean C# API for other mods to make local LLM calls via LM Studio, Ollama, or any OpenAI-compatible backend.
Features: - Async LLM chat completions with background threading - Dynamic request queue with per-mod budget allocation - Response sanitization (strips think blocks, repairs JSON) - Auto model discovery and mapping - Keep-alive pings to prevent model unloading - GPU monitoring framework - Structured debug logging
This is a library mod — it does nothing on its own. Install mods that depend on RimSynapse Core to add AI features to your game.
Requires: Harmony
